Ibn Haldun Academy '25 Theme and Incentive Awards were Presented at the Closing Ceremony

26.05.2025

Ibn Haldun Academy's 2025 program ended with the presentation of the Theme Awards and Incentive Awards given within the Academy and dinner after the Closing Lecture with the presence of Prof. Dr. İbrahim Kalın.

The 2025 program of Ibn Haldun Academy, which is a feast of ideas that brings together young university students and graduates from all over Turkey around certain themes every year with esteemed professors who have a say in their field, ended with the Award Ceremony and dinner after the Closing Lecture with the presence of Prof. Dr. İbrahim Kalın.

The first Ibn Haldun Academy was organized in 2023 with the theme of “Aesthetics” and the second one was organized last year under the title of “Diluted Times”, and this year's theme was “Developing Culture and Ecosystem”. In the seminars and conferences organized within the scope of this year's Academy program, our professors focused on how the dynamics, neighborhoods, interaction and communication opportunities that provide encouragement/motivation, hope, exchange of information and knowledge were captured in the past, how they are alive today, and how they will extend into the future.

The Closing Program and Award Ceremony held after the Closing Lecture in the Ibn Haldun Academy '25 program was held on Saturday, May 24, 2025 at Ibn Haldun University Complex with the participation of Assoc. Prof. Dr. Kübra Güran Yiğitbaşı, Governor of Afyonkarahisar, Prof. İrfan Gündüz, Chairman of the Board of Trustees of our University, Necmeddin Bilal Erdoğan, Vice Chairman of the Board of Trustees, Prof. Atilla Arkan, our Rector, and a distinguished group of guests from the Academy participant youth, culture and arts world, media and non-governmental organizations.
